# AdSense Eligibility Checker

> Free tool that analyzes any website against Google AdSense approval requirements and gives a detailed score with recommendations.

The site lets visitors enter a URL and instantly receive a breakdown of domain criteria, site availability, content quality, and performance — plus AI-powered content analysis, revenue estimates, and an improvement timeline.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Run an AdSense eligibility check on any website and view the full score breakdown.
- [Resources](/resources): Guide to AdSense approval — tips, requirements checklist, and FAQs.
- [Dashboard](/dashboard): Recent-check history and analytics for sites you've analyzed.
